blockingIssues.description: Ideas API route uses buffered `generateText` instead of streaming `streamText`, violating the feature contract and mission AI streaming convention.
Saved-recipe success link points to `/recipes/${savedRecipeId}` but `/recipes/[id]` route is not present in this milestone commit, so direct URL access behavior is not actually satisfied.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify TDD requirement as either strict (must fail-first) with enforceable checks, or relax it to allow test-after-implementation workflows with explicit disclosure.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Constraint-form, AI-ideas, refinement, and full-recipe reviews all observed implementation edits preceding test creation/updates while handoff feedback still reported followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit reviewer/worker checklist item that AI route handlers expected to stream must use `streamText` and include a test assertion for streaming behavior.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature generation-ai-ideas implemented `generateText` in `src/app/api/generate/ideas/route.ts` despite mission/library guidance indicating streaming AI endpoints.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align milestone contracts with route availability so generation features do not require `/recipes` direct-detail behaviors before recipes routes are implemented, or explicitly add that dependency to generation scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: generation-full-recipe and generation-cross-flows referenced `/recipes` direct/list behaviors while `recipes-list-and-detail` is in pending conversion milestone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document where validator workers should retrieve Clerk test credentials (or required setup path) for authenticated manual checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Constraint-form review noted protected-route manual checks were limited by sign-in redirect and no credential source documented in shared library docs.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated TDD-process mismatch notes across multiple feature reviews.
Repeated generation/conversion sequencing mismatch notes from more than one review.
